synopsis: The all-ages Marvel/Star Comics series based on the animated Ewoks television show. Set on the forest moon of Endor before Return of the Jedi, it follows Wicket W. Warrick, Princess Kneesaa, and the Ewoks of Bright Tree Village across fourteen issues of adventures against the dangers of the forest. (Star Comics, 1985-1987.)
title: Ewoks (1985)
